title: Legal reforms and election manifestos in Tamil Nadu
description: A manifesto by a political party is a solemn declaration of intent as to the changes it wishes to implement to improve the lot of the common man. An ecosystem that enables hassle-free pursuit of justice is the aspiration of every citizen. It is also an undeniable truth that today our justice delivery system is suffering from multiple health issues.The notable maladies are:Massive delays and case backlog; judicial vacancies, poor judge–population ratio and training deficit; Procedural complexity,
